source_title: 07 Lighting/09 Converting Baked Lighting to Dynami

evidences.content: 好了，让我们来看看如何将预制环境转换为 All right, so let's walk through how to take a pre-baked environment and convert it into a 动态照明环境。我将使用这个示例项目，即 ICVFX 示例项目、 dynamic lighting environment. I'm going to use this sample project, the ICVFX sample project, 因为我一定会建议你下载这个软件，并试着把它拆开看看。 because I would definitely recommend downloading this and trying to tear this apart and see 他们究竟是如何制作的。我认为这是对逼真主义最好的介绍之一 exactly how they built this. I think this is one of the best introductions to photorealism 在虚幻引擎中。如果您想进一步了解，请下载该软件、 inside of Unreal Engine. So give this a download if you want to look further, 但这适用于任何环境。因此，我判断这是烘焙照明的方法是我 but this will apply to any environment. So the way that I can tell that this is baked lighting is I 我可以在这里搜索我所有的灯，然后隐藏这些灯，我可以看到这些灯几乎是一样的。还有 can search for all my lights here and hide these, and I can see that this is almost identical. And 如果我看一下，并确保我的定向灯，是的，它是隐藏的，这实际上并不使 if I look and make sure that my directional light, yes it is, it's hidden, that actually doesn't make 任何区别。真的，我们在这里确实有一点区别，但所有的光线还是 any difference at all. Really, we do have a little bit of a difference here, but all the light still 存在于我们的场景中。因此，如果我想将其转换为动态照明，我只需 exists inside of our scene. So if I wanted to convert this to dynamic lighting, I would just 如果你没有看到这个，它就在 window 和 have to go over to these world settings, and if you don't see this, it's just under window and 世界设置。然后，我要在这里选中 "强制无预计算照明"，你可以看到它 world settings. And then I'm going to check force no pre-computed lighting here, and you can see it 说，现在启用了这一功能，构建一次照明来传播更改并移除现有的 says now that this is enabled, build lighting once to propagate the change and remove existing 照明数据。因此，从这里开始，我所要做的就是转到 "构建"，然后只构建照明数据、 lighting data. So from here, all I would have to do is go over to build and build lighting only, 现在，这将破坏所有预先计算好的照明。如果 and now this is going to destroy all of that pre-computed lighting. Now what can happen if 如果您所在的场景有预计算灯光，您可能会看到以下预览文本 you're in a scene that has pre-computed lighting is you might start to see this preview text show 这种情况发生在过去烘焙灯光的时候，通常是静态灯光、 up in your shadows, and this happens when a light was baked in the past, usually a static light, 而你现在已经破坏了光烘焙。因此，如果我想去掉预览文本，我只需要 and you've now broken that light bake. So if I want to get rid of that preview text, all I need 要做的就是转到 "显示"，在这个下拉菜单中，我只需要转到 "可视化"，然后你就能看到 to do is go to show, and in this drop down, I just have to go to visualize, and you can see that the 预览阴影指标设置为 "true"。因此，如果我禁用它，这些阴影就会消失。你必须 preview shadows indicator is set to true. So if I disable that, those will go away. You'll have to 我知道在游戏模式和非游戏模式下都必须检查此设置。因此，当我不在 know that you have to check this setting for both game mode and non-game mode. So when I'm not in 游戏模式，如果我转到 "显示"，你会看到这个选项仍然设置为 "true"，但现在我把它关闭了 game mode, if I go to show, you'll see this is still set to true, but now I've turned it off 现在它应该永远消失了。如果你曾经 in the editor mode and inside of game mode, and now it should be gone forever. And if you ever 即使在影片渲染队列中，也需要确保隐藏此选项，以强制关闭此选项、 need to make sure that this is hidden even in your movie render queue, just to force this to be off, 您可以使用 show flag dot 预览阴影指示器的命令变量，并将其设置为零、 you can use this command variable of show flag dot preview shadows indicator and set this to zero, 这样就可以强制完全关闭该功能，使其永远不会出现 and that will just force this feature to be off completely, and that way it won't ever show up 在你的渲染中。现在，如果我按下 "全部保存 "键，我要做的关键事情就是保存 in your renders. Now if I press save all, the key thing I have to do here is I would have to save 上的构建数据。这就是我们的灯光烘焙在场景中的存储位置，因此我必须 over this build data. This is where our light bake is being stored in our scene, so I would have to 点击 "选定保存 "覆盖这些文件，这样才能真正破坏灯光烘焙。否则，如果我关闭此 hit save selected to overwrite these files to truly destroy the light bake. Otherwise, if I close this 然后再重新打开，灯光烘焙就会恢复。但如果您想再次烘焙，只需转到 down and reopen it, the light bake will return. But if you want to bake this again, you just go 来构建 GPU 光块，现在我们可以通过按下这个 to build GPU light mass, and now we have the ability to bake our lighting by pressing this 构建照明按钮。这将烘焙我们的灯光。最后会对其进行去噪处理，我通常喜欢 build lighting button. This will bake our lighting. It will denoise it at the end, and I usually like 作为起始样本数，达到 2048 个，然后增加一倍或一半，以提高质量 as a starting sample count to go to 2048, and then either double or half this to increase your quality 或缩短渲染时间。此外，您还需要确保在渲染时将实时设置为关闭。 or decrease the render times. And you'll also want to make sure real time is set to off when you're 这样可以加快烘焙时间。就是这样。这就是你要做的。 baking, and that will really speed up your bake times. And that's it. That's all you have to do. 如果要确保流明在场景中计算，最后需要验证的是转到 The last thing to verify if you want to make sure that lumen is calculating in the scene is go to 然后向下滚动，直到看到全局光照，然后我们就可以 your post process volume and then scroll down until you see global illumination, and then we'll just 要确保流明已启用，在本例中就是这样，我们要设置反射 want to make sure that lumen is enabled, and in this case it is, and we want to set our reflections 到流明。现在，我们已经从静态照明转向了动态照明。从这里开始 to lumen as well. And now we've gone from static lighting to dynamic lighting. And from here you 可以删除场景中的所有反射捕捉，并将任何灯光从 could delete all the reflection captures out of your scene and change any of your lights from 从静止到固定或移动。 static to stationary or movable.
